# Oshi Desk

Official site: https://www.oshidesk.com/

Oshi Desk is a free desktop pet app for Windows and macOS. It lets users keep favorite characters close to their desktop screen.

Current characters:
- Hebinyang
- Ishalong

Current version: 0.2.4

Supported platforms:
- Windows
- macOS Apple Silicon
- macOS Intel

Language pages:
- Korean: https://www.oshidesk.com/ko/
- English: https://www.oshidesk.com/en/
- Japanese: https://www.oshidesk.com/ja/
- Traditional Chinese: https://www.oshidesk.com/zh-tw/

Downloads are provided through the official GitHub releases for Project-Undonghae/oshi-desk.

Official social:
- X: https://x.com/Oshi_Desk

Contact:
- ssongshare0720@gmail.com
